title: RBS Vanilla Experience
description: Optimized and atmospheric Minecraft 1.21.8 (Fabric) modpack featuring enhanced visuals, smooth performance, and modern graphical effects.
body:
# ✨ RBS Vanilla Experience

**RBS Vanilla Experience** is a modpack created for the private **RBS Vanilla** server.  
It enhances **visuals, atmosphere, and performance** — while keeping the **authentic vanilla Minecraft feel**.  
Smooth FPS, modern look, and the original spirit of the game.

---

## 🌿 Highlights

- ⚡️ **Performance:** *Sodium*, *Lithium*, *FerriteCore*, *ImmediatelyFast*, *Entity Culling*  
- 🌅 **Graphics:** *Iris*, *Continuity*, *Entity Texture Features*, *Dynamic Lights*, *BetterGrassify*  
- 🎨 **Comfort:** *BetterThirdPerson*, *Chat Heads*, *Inventory Profiles Next*, *Held Item Info*, *Mouse Tweaks*  
- 🎧 **Atmosphere:** *Sound Physics Remastered* adds realistic environmental acoustics  

---

## 🔧 Details

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.8 (Fabric)  
- **Shader Support:** ✅ via *Iris*  
- **Use Case:** Private server & singleplayer  
- **Focus:** Vanilla style, modern visuals, stable FPS  
- **Compatibility:** Fully tested and balanced  

---

## 🛠️ Recommended Settings

To get the best experience:  
- Use **Iris + Complementary Shaders** for realistic lighting.  
- Set **Render Distance** to *10–16 chunks* for stable performance.  
- Enable **VSync** if you notice screen tearing.  
- Keep **Dynamic Lights** and **BetterGrassify** enabled for immersion.  

---

## 📦 Included Mods Overview

| Category | Example Mods | Description |
|-----------|---------------|-------------|
| **Performance** | Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling | Boosts FPS and stability |
| **Visuals** | Iris, Continuity, ETF, BetterGrassify | Enhances lighting, connected textures, and atmosphere |
| **Interface** | BetterThirdPerson, Chat Heads, Inventory Profiles Next | Improves UI and player control |
| **Immersion** | Sound Physics Remastered | Adds realistic sound and depth |

---

✨ *RBS Vanilla Experience was made with care — to make Minecraft smoother, prettier, and cozier, without losing its original vanilla charm.*
